ddls:
CREATE TABLE "medicines" (
  "medicine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medicine */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the medicine */,
  "other_name" TEXT /* Other name or generic name of the medicine */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the medicine */,
  "therapeutic_class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the therapeutic class of the medicine */,
  "strength" TEXT /* Strength of the medicine */,
  "form" TEXT /* Form of the medicine */,
  "dosage_instructions" TEXT /* Dosage instructions for the medicine */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("medicine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drug_names" (
  "drug_name_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each drug name */,
  "medicine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the medicine the drug name belongs to */,
  "drug_name" TEXT /* Drug name */,
  "active_ingredient" TEXT /* Active ingredient of the drug */,
  "dosage_form" TEXT /* Dosage form of the drug */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("drug_name_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drug_names_medicine_id FOREIGN KEY ("medicine_id") REFERENCES medicines ("medicine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "therapeutic_classes" (
  "therapeutic_class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each therapeutic class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the therapeutic class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the therapeutic class */,
  "parent_class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent therapeutic class */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the therapeutic class is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("therapeutic_class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the manufacturer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the manufacturer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the manufacturer */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the manufacturer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medicine_manufacturers" (
  "medicine_manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medicine-manufacturer relationship */,
  "medicine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the medicine */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manufacturer */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date the medicine was approved by the manufacturer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of manufacture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("medicine_manufacturer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medicine_manufacturers_manufacturer_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer_id") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medicine_manufacturers_medicine_id FOREIGN KEY ("medicine_id") REFERENCES medicines ("medicine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "medicine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the medicine */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the medicine in stock */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the medicine */,
  "storage_location" TEXT /* Storage location of the medicine */,
  "batch_number" TEXT /* Batch number of the medicine */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the medicine */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the inventory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_medicine_id FOREIGN KEY ("medicine_id") REFERENCES medicines ("medicine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "batch_numbers" (
  "batch_number_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each batch number */,
  "medicine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the medicine */,
  "batch_number" TEXT /* Batch number */,
  "manufacture_date" TEXT /* Manufacture date of the batch */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the batch */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the batch */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manufacturer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("batch_number_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_batch_numbers_manufacturer_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer_id") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_batch_numbers_medicine_id FOREIGN KEY ("medicine_id") REFERENCES medicines ("medicine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demand" (
  "demand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demand entry */,
  "medicine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the medicine */,
  "in_demand" INTEGER /* Demand status of the medicine */,
  "demand_date" TEXT /* Date of the demand entry */,
  "quantity_demanded" INTEGER /* Quantity of the medicine demanded */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the demand is observed */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the demand */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demand_medicine_id FOREIGN KEY ("medicine_id") REFERENCES medicines ("medicine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., pharmacist, warehouse manager, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "medicine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the medicine accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, update) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used for access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., view, update, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_medicine_id FOREIGN KEY ("medicine_id") REFERENCES medicines ("medicine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "generic_equivalents" (
  "generic_equivalent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each generic equivalent */,
  "medicine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the medicine */,
  "generic_name" TEXT /* Generic name of the medicine */,
  "strength" TEXT /* Strength of the generic equivalent */,
  "form" TEXT /* Form of the generic equivalent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("generic_equivalent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_generic_equivalents_medicine_id FOREIGN KEY ("medicine_id") REFERENCES medicines ("medicine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medicine_generic_equivalents" (
  "medicine_generic_equivalent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medicine-generic equivalent relationship */,
  "medicine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the medicine */,
  "generic_equivalent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the generic equivalent */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the generic equivalent */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date the generic equivalent was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("medicine_generic_equivalent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medicine_generic_equivalents_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medicine_generic_equivalents_medicine_id FOREIGN KEY ("medicine_id") REFERENCES medicines ("medicine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medicine_generic_equivalents_generic_equivalent_id FOREIGN KEY ("generic_equivalent_id") REFERENCES generic_equivalents ("generic_equivalent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expiration_date_reminders" (
  "reminder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reminder */,
  "medicine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the medicine */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the medicine */,
  "reminder_date" TEXT /* Reminder date for the expiration */,
  "sent_to" INTEGER /* ID of the user who will receive the reminder */,
  "sent_date" TEXT /* Date the reminder was sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reminder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expiration_date_reminders_medicine_id FOREIGN KEY ("medicine_id") REFERENCES medicines ("medicine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expiration_date_reminders_sent_to FOREIGN KEY ("sent_to") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
